sourceArtifacts: 落地设计文档/11-M1.3x回归清零版分步骤文档.md

scope.name: 阻断证据冻结与门禁口径对齐

privacy.rankEvidenceScope: top10_only; null rank means the selected related case id is not present in the recorded top10 for that mode.

primaryGate.role: M1.3x candidate comparison primary line; used for candidate selection and final hard gate.

compatibilityGate.role: Compatibility reference only; must remain, must not replace M1.3 candidate comparison.

consistencyChecks.explanation: The 7 M1.3 combined after-vs-baseline REGRESSED query ids exactly match the 7 product eval METRIC_REGRESSION query ids; product eval adds 7 distinct RECALL_MISS ids.

The M1.2 compatibility runner preserves the legacy currentBefore/currentAfter check. Its counts match the M1.3 recall-only candidate, while the M1.3 combined candidate adds the M1.3 guard and is the primary gate candidate line.
Both artifacts conclude base search GO, weighted rerank gray candidate NO_GO, and M2 readiness NO_GO.
